bead.title: [read-coverage] add layer-aware run-history HTTP + MCP routes
bead.description: FEAT-021/010 gap. No routes or tools exist for the three-layer run substrate (work → try → run drill-down). The unified substrate (plan-2026-04-29 bead #18) collapses .ddx/exec-runs/ and .ddx/executions/ into one record shape with layer metadata. Add HTTP routes and MCP tools that expose this hierarchy: /api/runs (layer-3 work records), /api/tries (layer-2 try records), /api/runs/{id}/tries, /api/tries/{id}/runs; plus MCP tools ddx_list_runs, ddx_list_tries, ddx_show_run, ddx_show_try. Gate on bead #18 substrate unification.
